default.title: Something went wrong
default.message: An error occurred while loading data. Please try again.

empty.title: No data found
empty.message: There are no items to display.

notFound.title: Not Found
notFound.message: The requested item could not be found.

networkError.title: Network Error
networkError.message: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.

permissionError.title: Access Denied
permissionError.message: You don't have permission to access this resource. Please contact your administrator.
